ingredients_text: wholegrain flakes 82% [barley flakes 32%, oat flakes 21,1%, rice-fruit flakes 11,49% (rice, unrefined cane sugar, concentrated fruit juice (apple, dchery), natural flavours), w flakes 10,5%, com flakes 7% (com grits, unrefined cane sugar, sea salt, cane molasses)], fruits 18% [dried date (date, rice flour), candied fruits (cane sugar, pineapple, papaya)].
